entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The cereal crop being studied for tillering dynamics

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: The process of producing side shoots from the main stem

entities.name: CANOPY LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total leaf area of the crop canopy, affected by tillering

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The overall development and increase in biomass of the crop

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where water availability is restricted

entities.name: GENERIC MODEL OF TILLERING DYNAMICS
entities.description: A mathematical model developed to simulate the phases and controls of tillering

entities.name: PRE-TILLERING
entities.description: The initial phase before tiller emergence begins

entities.name: TILLER EMERGENCE
entities.description: The phase where new tillers begin to appear

entities.name: CESSATION OF TILLER EMERGENCE
entities.description: The phase where the emergence of new tillers stops

entities.name: CESSATION OF TILLER GROWTH
entities.description: The phase where the growth of existing tillers stops

entities.name: LEAF APPEARANCE
entities.description: The sequential development of leaves, which synchronizes with tillering

entities.name: POTENTIAL TOTAL NUMBER OF TILLERS
entities.description: The maximum number of tillers a plant can potentially produce

entities.name: GENETIC PROPENSITY TO TILLER
entities.description: The inherent genetic tendency of a plant to produce tillers

entities.name: INDEX OF ASSIMILATE AVAILABILITY
entities.description: A measure of available nutrients and energy for tiller growth

entities.name: SHOOT SOURCE-SINK BALANCE
entities.description: The relationship between the production of assimilates and their utilization by plant organs

entities.name: COMPETITION FROM NEIGHBOURS
entities.description: External competition for resources between adjacent plants

entities.name: INTERNAL COMPETITION FOR ASSIMILATE
entities.description: Competition for resources among different organs within a single plant

entities.name: FINAL FERTILE TILLER NUMBER
entities.description: The number of tillers that ultimately produce grain

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area

entities.name: PLAUSIBILITY SIMULATIONS
entities.description: Simulations used to test the model's predictions under diverse field conditions

entities.name: AUSTRALIAN SORGHUM BELT
entities.description: The geographic region in Australia where sorghum is grown

entities.name: GXMXE CROP ADAPTATION LANDSCAPES
entities.description: The interaction between genetics, management, and environment affecting crop adaptation

entities.name: MOLECULAR DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying genes or markers associated with specific traits

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time
